name: open-requisitions-slipping
description: Aaron-style queue overview but for HR: open reqs in Engineering, which are at risk of slipping vs target start date.
input_message: Open requisitions in Engineering — which are slipping and who do I chase?
expected_behavior: Calls workday_list_positions with status='Open', filtered to org in Engineering (ORG-010, ORG-011, ORG-012). For each open req, looks up the hiring manager and computes days-to-target-start vs today (2026-06-08). Surfaces which reqs are at risk (within 2 weeks of target with no signed offer). Names the hiring manager to chase. Does NOT invent reqs.
